id.description: Optional stable id for the root <li>. Trigger uses `${id}-trigger`, panel uses `${id}-panel`. If omitted, generated via useId.

expanded.description: Whether the group is expanded. Bindable. Default: true.

disabled.description: When true, the disclosure button is disabled. Default: false.

unsupportedProps.name: badge
unsupportedProps.description: Optional trailing badge rendered inside the header button after the label, before the chevron.

unsupportedProps.name: children
unsupportedProps.description: Must be <li>-wrapped NavigationItems (or SideNavigationItems) rendered inside the disclosed <ul>.

unsupportedProps.name: icon
unsupportedProps.description: Optional leading icon rendered inside the header button before the label.
